summary: #68561 remains the live canonical issue. #90566 is the open, focused candidate fix for the same ANNOUNCE_SKIP cron warning path, but merge and fix actions are disabled for this plan-mode job and merge preflight does not include a passed Codex /review proof.

actions.reason: This remains the best live canonical report for the root ANNOUNCE_SKIP cron behavior; keep it open until the linked fix lands and is validated.
This is the active candidate fix for #68561, but it should remain as a related open PR in this plan-only cluster because merge is blocked by job policy and missing required merge preflight.
